creator: bogus19@veggiechinese.net
text: The spamassassin port requires gnupg1 when built with the option to check GPG keys in sa-update, but I imagine it should be able to work with gnupg (which now defaults to gnupg2) also. This ends up blowing away my earlier installation of gnupg2 as the default 'gpg' etc. in my path.
